# Chess Piece SVGs

Place chess piece SVG images here for chessboard.js.

Download from: https://chessboardjs.com/
The images should be named: wK.svg, wQ.svg, wR.svg, wB.svg, wN.svg, wP.svg,
bK.svg, bQ.svg, bR.svg, bB.svg, bN.svg, bP.svg

These are used by chessboard.js to render pieces on the board.
